title: CT2 0AA, Southern Water Services Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/NP3698HN/V007
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Southern Water Services Limited   Installation name: Canterbury Sludge Treatment Centre   Permit number: EPR/NP3698HN   "
